title: The 10 Highest-Grossing Movies of 2025
text:
Based on worldwide box office data as of December 31, 2025:

Top 10 Films:

1. Ne Zha 2 - $2.15 billion. Chinese animated mythology film that dominated the Chinese box office, becoming the fifth highest-grossing movie of all time.

2. Zootopia 2 - $1.4 billion. Animated sequel featuring adventurous buddy-cop storytelling across diverse biomes and landscapes.

3. Lilo & Stitch - $1.038 billion. Live-action Disney remake featuring the beloved character Stitch, though the adaptation made controversial changes to the original story.

4. A Minecraft Movie - $958 million. Original video game adaptation starring Jack Black as Steve, prioritizing humor and entertainment for younger audiences.

5. Jurassic World: Rebirth - $869 million. Dinosaur action film focusing on spectacle rather than scientific exposition, employing a back-to-basics approach.

6. Avatar: Fire and Ash - $794 million. Still in theaters; likely to exceed $1.5 billion. Continues the franchise's tradition of cutting-edge visual technology.

7. Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle - $719 billion. Highest-grossing anime film of all time, featuring stunning animation and dramatic action sequences.

8. How to Train Your Dragon - $636 million. Live-action remake surpassing its 2010 animated predecessor in box office earnings.

9. F1: The Movie - $632 million. Apple Studios' highest-grossing film, featuring kinetic racing sequences and Brad Pitt's magnetic performance.

10. Superman - $617 million. James Gunn's DCU reboot introducing an optimistic, emotionally resonant take on the character.
